articles.title: Abu Dhabi Investment Portfolio: 6 stocks surge up to 110% in FY26, 3 fresh Q3 picks
articles.description: The equity portfolio of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority (ADIA), managed through its global funds, has recorded a 7% gain so far in FY26, rising from Rs 3,774 crore in March to Rs 3,910 crore as of March 20, 2026. As of the December 2025 quarter, the portfolio includes holdings in 26 publicly listed Indian companies.Despite this modest overall growth, performance has been uneven: six stocks have delivered strong gains in the 30–110% range, while the majority have posted negative returns. The top four laggards have declined between 30% and 47% during FY26 to date. Additionally, three new stocks were added in the December 2025 quarter: Strides Pharma, Indigo Paints, and Tenneco Clean Air. (Data Source: ACE Equity, Trendlyne)

articles.title: Govt orders WhatsApp to block device IDs used in digital arrest scams: Sources
articles.description: Govt orders WhatsApp to block device IDs used in digital arrest scams Sources

articles.title: PM Modi conveys Eid and Nowruz greetings to Iran President, stresses on open shipping lanes amid West Asia conflict
articles.description: PM Modi spoke with Iranian President Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian, extending Eid and Nowruz greetings while emphasizing hope for peace and stability in West Asia. He condemned attacks on infrastructure, warning they disrupt global supply chains and stressed the need to secure shipping routes.

articles.title: 'Shipping lanes must remain open, secure': PM Modi speaks with Iran President, second since West Asia war
articles.description: PM Modi said, “Spoke with President Dr. Masoud Pezeshkian and conveyed Eid and Nowruz greetings.”

articles.title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu inaugurates food analysis laboratory in Tirumala
articles.description: The facility routinely collects samples from multiple sources and conducts rigorous testing, including those used in the preparation of Srivari Prasadam and Anna Prasadam

articles.title: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu prays at Tirumala temple; eats at Annadanam complex
UDF women’s representation stays below 10%
articles.description: Congress party's women candidates for Kerala elections remain under 10%, with only 9 out of 92 nominees. UDF's overall representation is similarly low at 8%.

articles.title: Delhi rolls out 300 e-buses, launches Nanaksar–Ghaziabad route to boost green transport
articles.description: Delhi rolls out  ebuses launches NanaksarGhaziabad route to boost green transport

articles.title: Uttam Nagar Muslims shower flowers on cops after peaceful Eid-ul-Fitr prayers despite ‘Khoon ki Holi’ threats—video
articles.description: Residents of Delhi's Uttam Nagar celebrated Eid peacefully, expressing gratitude to Delhi Police for maintaining security after recent communal tensions. Locals shared a sense of safety during festivities, countering negative portrayals on social media.

articles.title: 'Got full support': Muslims of Delhi's Uttam Nagar shower flowers on police after peaceful Eid prayers | Watch
articles.description: Uttam Nagar has been tense after a 26-year old man died in clashes that broke out over fight over water balloon on Holi earlier this month.

dailyNews.title: Suspected kidnapping bid on son of Himachal CM's aide, unknown persons booked
dailyNews.description: According to reports, the incident occurred late Friday (March 20) evening when Aryan Chauhan, who is also the general secretary of Himachal Pradesh Youth Congress, was going to Shimla from his hotel in Mashobra.

dailyNews.title: Trump hints at ‘winding down’ Iran war as US deploys more troops to region
dailyNews.description: Trump says he is not looking for a ceasefire with Iran as mixed messages from US president come amid an escalating war.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Meryl Streep: ‘Disrespect invites disrespect, violence incites violence...’
dailyNews.description: Quote of the Day by Meryl Streep: Meryl Streep once referred to Donald Trump who reportedly mocked a journalist, and urged the world to be kind. ‘When the powerful use their position to bully others, we all lose,’ she also said.

dailyNews.title: Rupali Chakankar’s exit not enough; probe must target ‘big fish’, says Congress leader
dailyNews.description: Congress leader Vijay Wadettiwar alleged that attempts were underway to shield the influential people linked to the self-styled godman Ashok Kharat, who was arrested earlier this week in Nashik.

dailyNews.title: Explained: Why gold prices remain subdued despite West Asia tensions
dailyNews.description: Gold prices have unexpectedly fallen despite escalating geopolitical tensions, a departure from their safe-haven status. A strong U.S. dollar, rising Treasury yields, and profit-taking after a prior rally are suppressing bullion. While the near-term outlook is choppy, long-term prospects remain constructive due to persistent geopolitical risks and inflation concerns.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: American diplomat Henry Kissinger's word of wisdom on foreign policy — ‘A country that demands…’
dailyNews.description: Henry Kissinger, influential diplomat and advisor, founded Kissinger Associates post-government.

dailyNews.title: Career criminal accused of breaking into home, climbing into bed with child as family slept
dailyNews.description: An Oklahoma man allegedly broke into a family's home and climbed into an 11-year-old's bed. Charles Bradford faces first-degree burglary charges.

dailyNews.title: Legendary sports agent suggests fresh approach teams should take as NFL ticket prices continue to skyrocket
dailyNews.description: Legendary sports agent Leigh Steinberg proposed an idea that NFL teams should reserve 10,000 seats per game for working families, as ticket prices continue to soar across stadiums.

dailyNews.title: A brave Marine colonel took on the Pentagon — and paid the price for it
dailyNews.description: How one Marine colonel transformed Pentagon AI capabilities with Project Maven, only to face bureaucratic investigations that took a heavy toll on his career.

dailyNews.title: GOP senator’s gambit exposes false Dem claims about supporting voter ID
dailyNews.description: Sen. Jon Husted's standalone voter ID bill was blocked by Sen. Jeff Merkley via unanimous consent amid the Senate's battle over the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Soros-backed Austin DA faces resignation calls over alleged ‘secret meetings’ in case against cop
dailyNews.description: Police groups are calling on DA Jose Garza to resign over alleged Brady violations and secret meetings tied to an APD officer's 2020 Austin riot case.

topStories.title: 'The View' argues whether Iran campaign is historic blunder like Iraq or will keep future Americans safe
topStories.description: CNBC's Sara Eisen argued on "The View" that Trump's Iran military operation will keep future Americans safe from a nuclear threat, but co-hosts pushed back.

topStories.title: American Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti thanks Trump for Army-Navy game executive order
topStories.description: American Athletic Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti praised President Donald Trump for signing an executive order to protect the Army-Navy game's exclusive broadcast window.

topStories.title: Rep Boebert rejects call for another $200 billion to fund Iran war, while Americans 'can’t afford to live'
topStories.description: Rep. Boebert warned the policies being enacted by the Trump administration are not putting Americans first, warning the GOP needs to change course before the midterms.

topStories.title: High Gas Prices, Driven Up by the Iran War, Loom Over the Midterms
topStories.description: The war has complicated the Republican message on affordability. Democrats see an opportunity to drive their economic message while tying President Trump to an unpopular overseas conflict.

topStories.title: Trump’s Ballroom Architect Is Skilled at Shrugging Off Outrage
topStories.description: Shalom Baranes, who arrived in the U.S. as a Libyan refugee and went on to renovate the Pentagon, is baffling fellow architects for accepting the job. But he said some of his previous projects have drawn outrage too.

topStories.title: One Year After Trump’s $400 Million Ultimatum, a Different Columbia
topStories.description: As they sought to respond to charges of antisemitism and harassment on campus, administrators and trustees made promises. Many have been kept, but not all.

dailyNews.title: Fidel Castro’s Grandson Flaunts Beer, Nikes and Trump Jokes on Instagram
dailyNews.description: Sandro Castro has drawn scrutiny for his Instagram posts in which he flaunts a life of luxury while using satire to point out the very deterioration his family’s leadership helped create.

dailyNews.title: Americans Deserve the Truth About Iran
dailyNews.description: Whatever short-term gain the president thinks he is getting by lying about the war in Iran is far exceeded by the cost, for him, the country and the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Recklessness Will ‘Haunt Us for a Generation’
dailyNews.description: Three Opinion writers on Iran, the SAVE America Act and the president’s folly.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Iran war reached the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials said.

dailyNews.title: Trump is strategizing means to seize Iran's nuclear stockpiles, sources say
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has been strategizing methods and options to secure or extract Iran's nuclear materials, according to multiple sources, as the military campaign against Tehran enters a more uncertain phase.

dailyNews.title: Colombian President Petro caught up in narcotics trafficking probes, sources say
dailyNews.description: The separate narco-trafficking investigations, based out of New York's Southern and Eastern districts, didn't set out to target Petro, but his name has come up during the course of the probes, one source said.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration temporarily lifts sanctions on Iranian oil at sea
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Treasury has authorized the purchase of Iranian oil that's already at sea, exempting buyers from the tight sanctions that have restricted Iran's oil industry for years, as the Trump administration grapples with high oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he doesn't want Iran war ceasefire, but is considering 'winding down' military ops
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, "will have to be guarded and policed, as necessary, by other Nations who use it."

dailyNews.title: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
dailyNews.description: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration unveils national AI policy framework to limit state power
dailyNews.description: AI industry leaders have opposed state-level regulatory efforts, arguing that a "patchwork" of laws would hobble innovation and give China a competitive edge.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
